title: Command Search Cockpit
concept: A live-browser-first Playground cockpit where command search is the discovery layer and the right inspector executes grouped commands with route-specific forms, consequences, progress, and final state mutations.
flows: Search for a command, review grouped results, select Save in this browser, run progress, and update shell title, path slug, storage badge, saved row, settings consequence, preview state, and transfer history

Import a ZIP over the current Playground with source selection, invalid-file failure, replacement warning, progress, successful active identity update, path change, storage badge mutation, preview update, and transfer history
Save to a local directory with folder permission copy, distinct storage identity, local saved row metadata, and reload/reconnect consequence
Create from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and ZIP import through command-specific forms with constraints and progress
Manage saved, local, imported, and temporary Playgrounds with open, manage, rename, delete confirmation, delete cancellation, final row removal, and active fallback
Use Site Manager settings, files, Blueprint, database, logs, Export to GitHub, Download as zip, database download, and Blueprint bundle actions while the live browser remains visible
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start
WordPress PR preview
Gutenberg PR or branch preview
GitHub import with account connection and token caveat
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with validation, replacement warning, failure state, progress, and success state
Blueprint gallery categories and search-discovered tools with an honest representative subset of 43 entries
Featured Blueprint shortcuts including Art Gallery, Coffee Shop, Friends feed reader, Gaming News, Non-profit Organization, and Personal Blog
Save temporary Playground in browser storage
Save to a local directory
Browser and local save progress states
Saved, local-directory, imported, and unsaved Playground differences
Saved and unsaved Playground list
Open, manage, rename, delete confirmation, delete cancellation, row removal, and active fallback
Current shell path input and refresh
Homepage and WP Admin shortcuts
Temporary, saved, local-directory, GitHub import, and ZIP import storage badges
WordPress, PHP, language, older versions, network, and multisite settings
Destructive temporary reset and stored Save & Reload behavior
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected editor, dirty state, save progress, and result state
Blueprint URL, gallery categories, selected representative entries, editor, validation, copy, download, run, and result states
SQLite database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with warning state
Export to GitHub with connection and repository destination
Download active Playground as .zip
Portability actions for GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database download, and Blueprint bundle copy/download
Transfer history that records imports, exports, downloads, saves, file saves, Blueprint runs, settings reloads, and deletes
